title: statistics.py: HA Statistics API async wrapper
acceptance_criteria: Uses get_instance(hass).async_add_executor_job(...) pattern exclusively — no direct Recorder DB/SQL access
Async function(s) to fetch hourly/daily statistics for a given entity_id and date range
Returns pandas-friendly structure (list of dicts or DataFrame) for downstream resampling
Handles missing/None statistics gracefully with documented fallback behavior
completion_summary: Async Statistics API wrapper: fallback chain 5min->hour->day, DataFrame results, no direct DB access.
